{{CargoOrgan
|name=Blazing Gold Mane
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10940
|idx=91
|description=A cascading river of molten sunlight that warps reality with its thermal majesty.
|skill=
|hp=2486
|def=190
|atk=255
|rush=152
|gene1=Snail Arena, ELMT DMG REDUC +6%
|gene2=In explorations, DMG Reflection +150
|gene3=Wind DMG +1.5%
|gene4=Restore 600 HP each round
|gene5=Gain Shield when the fight begins, DUR +1200
|gene7=ELMT RES +3% (Awakened)
|}}
